Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Maria Andrade'S Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admission, And To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Monica Castillo, Esq., LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY, (415) 538-3333, for Plaintiff.

Frank Kim, Esq., National Legal Associates, (415) 567-5700, for Defendants.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem Judge. The pro tem Judge and both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

RE: PLAINTIFF LUIS ARRIAGA'S Motion To Compel Defendant Maria Andrade'S Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admission, And To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions.

Ruling is argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the court confirms updated tentative ruling with counsel. No objection to the court's proposed tentative ruling is presented.

Counsel is to meet and confer re a stipulated proposed order and subsequently email it to the pro tem Judge at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
